director.name: 金伯利·麦卡洛 Kimberly McCullough

trans_title: 可爱尖牙小娜娜：少年吸血鬼
introduction: “Vampirina,” is based on the children’s books by Anne Maria Pace and inspired by the Disney Jr. animated series from Chris Nee. The new series follows a young vampire girl who leaves Transylvania to attend a performing arts boarding school and pursue her passion for music — all while keeping her identity a secret, something that’s made more challenging when her overprotective father charges an overzealous ghost to live with her at the school.
chinese_title: 可爱尖牙小娜娜：少年吸血鬼
